# sr — Semantic Release

> An AI-powered release engineering CLI — from commit to release. AI-powered commits, code review, PR generation, branch naming, and freeform Q&A with sandboxed read-only agents. Parses conventional commits, computes semver bumps (with v0 protection), generates changelogs, creates GitHub releases with artifact uploads, and bumps version files across Cargo.toml, package.json, pyproject.toml, pom.xml, Gradle, and Go. Supports monorepos with per-package independent versioning. Ships as both a CLI and a GitHub Action.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/README.md): Installation, CLI reference, configuration, and GitHub Action usage
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture and development guide
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history

## API / Key Files

- [crates/sr-core/src/release.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/sr-core/src/release.rs): Release orchestration (plan + execute)
- [crates/sr-core/src/config.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/sr-core/src/config.rs): YAML config parsing and defaults
- [crates/sr-core/src/commit.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/sr-core/src/commit.rs): Conventional commit parsing
- [crates/sr-core/src/changelog.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/sr-core/src/changelog.rs): Changelog generation with minijinja templates
- [crates/sr-core/src/version_files.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/sr-core/src/version_files.rs): Multi-language version file bumping
- [crates/sr-github/src/lib.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/sr-github/src/lib.rs): GitHub REST API provider
- [crates/sr-cli/src/main.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/sr-cli/src/main.rs): CLI entry point

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/skills/sr/SKILL.md): Agent skill for planning and executing releases
